name: GENESCO INC
business: Genesco Inc. is a retailer and wholesaler of branded footwear, apparel and accessories. It operates retail stores under the Journeys, Schuh, Johnston & Murphy, and Little Burgundy banners, and sells wholesale products under the Johnston & Murphy, Dockers, Levi's, and Wrangler brands. The company targets customers ranging from children to young adults and professionals.
sellsTo: Consumers through retail stores and e-commerce
Over 900 retail accounts including department, discount, specialty stores, and e-commerce retailers

exposures.sentence: Genesco Inc., incorporated in 1934 in the State of Tennessee, is a leading retailer and wholesaler of branded footwear, apparel and accessories with net sales for Fiscal 2026 of $2.4 billion.
Each of our businesses has a strong strategic position grounded in a deep and ever-evolving understanding of the customers it serves.

We maintain controls and safeguards to mitigate the risks to our systems and to protect this information and have made significant investments to improve our information security and privacy posture and keep pace with the ever changing and evolving risks to our systems and our information.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to launch the first Wrangler footwear collection under the licensing agreement in the Fall of calendar year 2026.

catalysts.event: Store opening and closing plans for Fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: We plan to open a total of approximately 23 new retail stores and to close approximately 75 retail stores in Fiscal 2027 as part of our ongoing store optimization efforts.
